results.title: What are Zoe Kravitz and Harry Styles' wedding plans after low-key engagement?
results.description: Zoë Kravitz and Harry Styles have no immediate plans to wed, despite Harry recently proposing with a reported $1 million diamond ring.

results.title: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's Wide-Eyed Reaction Goes Viral While Travelling Inside RR Team Bus Amid IPL 2026 | Video
results.description: Rajasthan Royals’ young player Vaibhav Sooryavanshi went viral during IPL 2026 after a light-hearted moment captured during team travel. While checking his phone, his wide-eyed, surprised reaction caught attention and amused fans. Clips of the expressive moment quickly spread online, with social media users joking about what he might have seen, turning the brief incident into a trending topic.

results.title: Mexico 2-0 Ghana, International Friendly: El Tri Cruise To Victory in World Cup Warm-up
results.description: Mexico sealed a comfortable 2-0 win over Ghana in an international friendly at the Estadio Cuauhtemoc in Puebla on Friday, giving El Tri a much-needed boost ahead of their FIFA World Cup 2026 campaign. The hosts took an early lead as Brian Gutierrez scored in the second minute. Ghana's young team responded well, with Jesurun Rak-Sakyi hitting the woodwork. However, Mexico remained in control and doubled their lead in the 54th minute through Guillermo Martinez. Ghana struggled to create chances, and Benjamin Asare made several key saves to prevent a heavier defeat.
